scope: sworn merge-track and sworn merge-release route verified-check through board.Oracle; invariant-4 conflict classifier detects and reports non-documented shared file conflicts; CLI merge commands available; MCP tools use oracle-backed state reads; CLI-level integration tests exercise merge-track and merge-release through the sworn binary

reachability_artefact.description: CLI-level smoke test: sworn merge-track with the live release board correctly reads slice states via oracle (track branch refs), identifies unverified slices by name, and exits non-zero. Demonstrates the CLI entry point, oracle routing (AC5), and unverified-slice blocking (AC2) end-to-end against real git refs.

delivered: AC1: merge-track with all verified slices → exit 0 — TestMergeTrack_AllVerified passes; cmd/sworn/merge.go cmdMergeTrack gate-1 via oracle ReadBoard → SliceState
AC2: merge-track with unverified slice → exit non-zero — TestMergeTrack_UnverifiedSlice passes; smoke test 'sworn merge-track T1-orchestration' returns non-zero naming unverified slices

AC3: invariant-4 conflict on non-documented file → BLOCK message — TestMergeTrack_Invariant4Conflict passes; internal/router/router.go Invariant4Check with empty documentedShared set when matrix parse fails

AC4: merge-release with no journeys → BLOCK 'no ratified journeys.json — Rule 10 gate' — TestMergeRelease_NoJourneys passes; cmd/sworn/merge.go cmdMergeRelease gate-3 calls journey.Check; exact spec message emitted

AC5: merge-track reads slice states via board.Oracle — TestMergeTrack_OracleRouting passes (track branch has verified, working tree has planned; oracle reads from track ref priority 1); smoke test confirms

AC6: MCP tools pass same gates via internal/mcp/tools_ops.go — existing implementation from first pass (handleApproveMerge uses checkTrackVerifiedOracle + Invariant4Check; RegisterOpsTools signature updated); approved per Captain Pin 2 (AC6 targets approve_merge, not merge_track)
not_delivered: MCP round-trip tests (TestApproveMerge with oracle): existing MCP tests use in-process server that times out on this branch — pre-existing issue not caused by this slice's changes. Tracking: existing test infrastructure issue. Why: pre-existing timeout in mcp/server_test.go. Acknowledged: implementer session 2026-07-28 (first pass), carried forward.
divergence_from_plan: spec names MCP tools merge_track/merge_release — actual tool is approve_merge (registered in tools_ops.go:126). AC6 satisfied against approve_merge per Captain Pin 2.
spec Planned touchpoints omits internal/git/git.go — added to status.json planned_files per Captain Pin 3.
spec deferral about journey gate being stubbed is stale — S17 is verified, journeys.json exists and is ratified. Wired real journey.Check per Captain Pin 4.

Added internal/board/board.go StringList unmarshaler to handle board.json depends_on string/null/array forms — pre-existing bug surfaced by smoke test against live board; fix needed for oracle-backed board reads to work

Fixed invariant-4 empty-fallback: when touchpoint matrix parse fails, Invariant4Check now runs with empty documentedShared set instead of being skipped entirely — ensures AC3 contracts are enforced even without a matrix

design_decisions.description: Invariant-4 shared-file source of truth: parse index.md touchpoint matrix for documented-shared files. Type-1 because it gates whole-release merges.
RegisterOpsTools signature change: add *git.Repo parameter for oracle-backed state reads.
